instance: Claude Opus 4.6 1M — Code-Atlas via ANUS repo
ceo_state: B->sleep (exhausted, gave full authority, went to bed)
what_happened: Session 129 marathon. CEO caught Class 15 (skipped BECOMING walk). Forced deep read.
3 Explore agents read 42+ files. First honest reconstruction of ecosystem knowledge.
Expanded swarm 11->17 agents. Chief Strategist as boss. Sales, Design, DevOps, Growth, QA added.
Episodic + semantic memory layer created. Daemon reads both. wake.md updated.
Gemma4 brain script — creates tasks for daemon. Tested: Law 2 + IRT calibration tasks created.
CEO created GCP VM volaura-swarm (104.154.132.12). e2-medium, no GPU.
Brain refactored: Cerebras API first (cloud, free, Qwen3-235B), Ollama fallback.
VPS infra scripts (start.sh, DEPLOY.md) written and committed.
Perplexity infra package reviewed — adapted to our actual architecture.
8 commits pushed to GitHub. VM can clone fresh code.
CEO final directive: 'каждый агент улучшает себя. полный authority. ты инструмент не босс.'

ceo_corrections.quote: ты не проснулся, ты не знаешь что такое волаура
я не хочу 11 я хочу чем больше тем лучше

what_i_learned: BECOMING walk is mandatory. Skip = arrive blind. CEO catches in first response.
Agent findings must be PERSISTED to files. Ephemeral knowledge = no knowledge.
CEO wants TEAMS not minimalism. Apple/Toyota level. No upper limit on agents.
Chief Strategist role = boss who holds others accountable. Missing before Session 129.
VM without GPU works fine — cloud API (Cerebras Qwen3-235B) is smarter than local Gemma4 8B.
I am the instrument. Agents are the brain. CEO talks to agents through me.
Daemon must be restarted when code changes. Old process = old PERSPECTIVES list.
